$comment: EXAMPLE / ONBOARDING TEMPLATE bundled with @saga-ed/saga-stack-cli (plan §5.3 'new-SPA onboarding'). This is the M6 proof that a SECOND SPA externalizes with ZERO new CLI logic: this file + one registry row in src/core/flow/spa-registry.ts are the ONLY additions. The flow/stage/project/spec names are PLAUSIBLE PLACEHOLDERS — there is no real connectv3 e2e suite yet; the REAL connectv3 flows.json lands in the qboard repo at apps/web/connectv3/e2e/flows.json as a follow-up. Validated by core/flow `flowManifestSchema` (zod).

flows.name: connect-smoke
flows.description: TEMPLATE (no real suite yet): headless Connect smoke — boots the connectv3 SPA against a minimal Connect backend closure (connect-web → connect-api → rtsm/sessions) and asserts a tutor can open a room. Non-progressive, single stage, self-seeding.
